title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 13th March 2026 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Accumulate slowly for the long term on sum-of-the-parts and AI value
recommendations.detail: Kutumba Rao said the US $300 billion investment is not the reason to buy Reliance. The case is long-term sum-of-the-parts value (Jio divestment/possible IPO, retail) and AI developments relevant here that will have more impact on the stock. He said start accumulating slowly because it is somewhat resilient versus several other stocks, but with a long-term horizon.

recommendations.note: Hold/accumulate; treat as a diversified engineering/defense stock, not just autos
recommendations.detail: Asked by a viewer holding M&M at Rs 1700, Kutumba Rao said keep it because M&M also has defense exposure and is a diversified engineering stock, not just automobiles. He said hold, fresh buying is fine, and if asked, he would accumulate.

recommendations.stock: Gitanjali Gems / Kingfisher Airlines / Mercator / GVK Power / Lanco / Alliance
recommendations.detail: Adding to the anchor's answer on a viewer's old holdings, Kutumba Rao said these have no liquidity at all and are completely dead, not even trading. There is no way to sell them, so they cannot be used for an LTCG set-off either.
